text: Stay informed with the latest tips and insights on protecting your PC from spyware, malware, and online threats. Spyware Abuse in Serbia Raises Privacy Concerns Spyware misuse in Serbia targets activists and journalists, exposing devices to surveillance. Learn how to protect your privacy and remove spyware.

Explore what Pegasus spyware is, how it operates, its implications, and measures to protect against such advanced threats. Learn how to identify and remove spyware from your Android phone to protect your personal information and ensure device security.
